title: Build vs Buy vs SaaS Decision Flow
description: An interactive vis-network decision tree that walks through four questions to recommend Build, Buy, or SaaS for a given capability, with example failure modes and 5-year cost shapes for each leaf.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Information Systems
IT Strategy
Application Development
learningObjectives: Apply the four-question heuristic to any capability
Justify a Build, Buy, or SaaS recommendation
Name the most common failure mode for each path
assumptions: Four-question heuristic captures the dominant trade-offs
limitations: Real decisions involve more variables (M&A, vendor stability, talent)
